title: IEEC Evidence Chain Schema
description: The Intent-to-Execution Evidence Chain (IEEC) schema for verifiable mutation lineage.

intent.description: The original intent payload submitted by the agent. Should adhere to intent.schema.json.

context.description: The aggregate of system state and historical data used for evaluation.

status.description: The outcome of the policy evaluation.

policy_id.description: Identifier of the specific policy triggered.

policy_version.description: Version of the policy at time of evaluation.

execution.description: The result of the mutation if status was ALLOW.

identity_id.description: The ephemeral identity used for execution.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the record creation.

previous_hash.description: Hash of the previous entry in the evidence chain.

current_hash.description: Cryptographic hash of the current record.
